# ContractSpec — LLM Guide (Monorepo Summary)

> The deterministic, spec-first compiler that keeps AI-written software coherent, safe, and regenerable. One mega library: contracts, runtime adapters, AI agents, and tooling.

## What is ContractSpec?

ContractSpec is a **spec-first compiler** and **mega library** for AI-generated software. Define contracts in TypeScript; generate API, DB, UI, events, and MCP tools. Regenerate safely; invariants enforced; breaking changes caught at compile time.

## Monorepo Structure

Layered architecture (dependencies flow down):

**apps → bundles → modules → libs**

| Layer | Path | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| libs | packages/libs/ | Foundation. Infrastructure, contracts, utilities. Zero deps on bundles/apps. |
| modules | packages/modules/ | Specialized implementations. Self-contained lifecycle/feature modules. |
| bundles | packages/bundles/ | Domain logic. Models, services, smart UI. Cannot import from apps. |
| apps | packages/apps/ | Platform adapters. Thin entry points (Next.js, CLI, VSCode). |
| examples | packages/examples/ | Reference implementations, demos, ready-to-clone use-cases. |
| tools | packages/tools/ | Build tools, scripts, ESLint/TS configs. |
| integrations | packages/integrations/ | Runtime adapters (cloud providers, database drivers). |
| apps-registry | packages/apps-registry/ | Application registry metadata. |

## Entry Points

- **/llms** (this file) — Global monorepo summary
- **/llms-full.txt** — Full content: all package READMEs aggregated. Note: Large file; agents may truncate. For specific packages, use /llms/[slug] instead.
- **/llms/[slug]** — Per-package guide. Slug = package name without @contractspec (e.g. lib.ai-agent, bundle.library). Recommended for agent fetches.

## Package-Specific Guides

For per-package docs, use /llms/{slug} where slug is the package name without @contractspec:

- lib.ai-agent — AI agent orchestration
- lib.contracts-spec — Core contracts, registries, policy
- lib.schema — Schema definitions
- bundle.library — Shared library, docs, templates
- bundle.marketing — Marketing pages
- app.cli-contractspec — CLI
- app.web-landing — This site

Full index: /llms-full.txt

## Key Principles

1. Spec → Implementation: Define contract first, then implement
2. AI reads specs: Agents use contracts as source of truth
3. Safe regeneration: Regenerate anytime without breaking invariants
4. No lock-in: Standard TypeScript, eject anytime

## Resources

- Website: https://contractspec.io
- Documentation: https://www.contractspec.io/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/lssm-tech/contractspec
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@contractspec/lib.contracts
- Studio: https://www.contractspec.studio
